title: Local Educational Ethos: Interviews with Pupils, Staff and Guardians in Secondary Schools 2019-2020
description: The data consists of interviews with pupils, carers and staff members from three different schools, in which the interviewees reflect on well-functioning schools and the urban challenges of education in segregated cities. Each interview transcript is in its own file, in one of three school-specific folders. Some of the interviews are individual interviews and some are group interviews.
